title: WedDecor Grosgrain Ivory Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, 25mm x 10m Solid Polyester Ribbon Perfect for Wedding Decor, Sewing, Dresses, DIY Crafts Floristry, Events, Scrapbooking Decorations
features: GROSGRAIN RIBBON SIZE: These grosgrain ribbon have a width of 25mm making them perfect for use in craft projects and gift wrapping
RIBBON LENGTH: These grosgrain ribbons having 10 Metres (11 Yards) length and can be cut into any size as per requirement
MATERIAL: Made from polyester material these ribbons have a high quality ribbon tightly woven with a texture of fine lines
EYE CATCHY COLOURS: Our grosgrain ribbons come in opulent & non-fading colours that add an eye-catchy vibrance to any decoration and great for gift wrapping, wedding invitations

VERSATILE USES: These ribbons are perfect for use in clothing, decoration and other craft & DIY projects. They are also great for decorative wrapping of gifts & presents wedding bouquets, wedding stationery, hair braids, hair bow, baby shower decoration, scrapbooking, sewing
description: Product Description Grosgrain Ribbon Roll - Reel of Polyester Fabric for Sewing, Arts and Crafts, Bows, Dresses, Gift Wrapping This premium quality grosgrain Ribbon is a classic and versatile ribbon made from 100% Polyester fabric Made from polyester material, these ribbons have a high-quality ribbon tightly woven with a texture of fine lines Perfect for clothing, wedding decoration, hotel decoration, party decorations, holiday decoration, hair bows, ornaments, Sewing, handicrafts, toys, floral packaging, and gift wrapping Please note: Actual colour of the ribbon may vary slightly due to differences in monitor display for the colour of the products WIDE APPLICATION These ribbons are perfect for use in clothing, decoration, and other craft & DIY projects. They are also great for decorative wrapping of gifts & presents wedding bouquets, wedding stationery, hair braids, hair bow, baby shower decoration, scrapbooking, sewing
